data.raceName: SPORTSBET SUPPORTERS OF HAVING A CRACK
data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. SAINT HARVEY settled down midfield and held his position to the line when finishing 4th (22.66) at this track. Some good form is emerging from his last run. Key runner on his best form. 7. SCOTT ELYSIAN turned in a moderate effort last time when sixth at this track over 390m behind Lion Man (22.78) in a Maiden H. Likely to be about the money. 8. CUSTOM produced a moderate performance last time when eighth at Healesville over 300m behind Pulchritudinous (17.86) in a Maiden. Key runner who gets his chance to atone. 5. HARTLAND BUSTER should be thereabouts.","runners":[2,7,8,5],"exclusive":false}
